tasks.label: git-commit-push
tasks.command:
cd /workspaces/Nexus-HEMS-Dash && git add -A && git commit -m 'feat(robustness): exponential backoff + jitter + navigator.onLine + Web Worker + per-adapter metrics + useShallow

BaseAdapter: exponential backoff with jitter, navigator.onLine/offline
  event listeners, auto-reconnect on network recovery, per-adapter
  performance metrics (latency, error-rate, data-freshness, reconnects)
Web Worker: adapter-worker.ts offloads REST polling and SunSpec data
  transformations from main thread (poll/transform/stop protocol)
useAdapterWorker: React hook bridging worker messages to useEnergyStore
useAdapterMetrics: samples BaseAdapter.perfMetrics at interval, computes
  system-wide averages, pushes to Prometheus collector
useEnergyStore: useShallow wrapper for automatic shallow comparison,
  prevents unnecessary re-renders on object selector slices
i18n: 16 new monitoring keys (latency, freshness, reconnect, worker) EN+DE' && git push
